    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    D

    data() - Method in record class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.CommandResult
    Returns the value of the data record component.
    decodeResponse(String) - Method in interface edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.JsonCodec
    Decodes a JSON response string into a JsonResponse object.
    decodeResponse(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.protocol.MBot2JsonCodec
    Decodes a JSON response string from the MBot2 robot into a JsonResponse object.
    deregisterTelemetry(TelemetryListener) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
    Deregisters a telemetry listener from the robot.
    disconnect() - Method in interface edu.desu.cis.robot.service.RobotService
    Disconnects from the robot.
    disconnect() - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.TcpRobotService
    Disconnects from the robot and closes all associated resources.
    discover(String) - Method in interface edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery.RobotDiscovery
    Discovers a robot with the specified robot ID.
    discover(String) - Method in class edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery.UdpDiscoveryService
    Discovers a robot with the specified ID using UDP broadcast.
    DiscoveredRobot - Record Class in edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery
    Represents a robot discovered on the network.
    DiscoveredRobot(String, String, int) - Constructor for record class edu.desu.cis.robot.discovery.DiscoveredRobot
    Creates an instance of a DiscoveredRobot record class.
    distance() - Method in record class edu.desu.cis.robot.service.SensorSnapshot
    Returns the value of the distance record component.
